example: Roleplay for call centers, banking and finance.
Hi, I lost my ATM card.
Do you know your account number?
Could you please confirm your mailing address?
I will cancel your current card and request a new ATM card.
It takes three to five business days.
That is our bank's policy.
I have a question about my credit card statement.
ja: クレジットカード明細書

example: For security reasons, may I have the last four digits of your social security number?
ja: セキュリティ上の理由

example: It seems that I have been charged twice on the 15th.
I will start an investigation of the second charge.
We will confirm with the merchant that there was only one charge.
Hello, I have a question about my debit account.
There's a transaction on my account that I don't understand.
For verification purposes, may I have your full name, please?
I had to put you on speakerphone. Can you hear me?
You don't recall making a purchase from that merchant?
May I put you on hold for a few minutes?
An order was placed and a delivery was made to your address.
A delivery was made to your address.
Please call back and we will resolve the issue.
